positive: Minimalist silhouette of a wise owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by delicate, stylized flora like ferns and ivy. The scene should be rendered with high contrast black ink on a clean white background, using a dot-work engraving style combined with modern linework. The owl must be highly detailed but maintain a clean, scalable silhouette. Composition is perfectly centered and framed for circular/square apparel prints. Emphasize deep black areas and negative space. Studio photography lighting, graphic novel aesthetic, clean vector art, intricate linework, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grainy, dirty, low resolution, graffiti, messy, realistic, colors, gradient, low contrast
